name: the composite dispatch auto-resolves a Terraform file to the checkov runner via the 4-axis routing
command: printf 'resource "aws_s3_bucket" "b" {}\n' > main.tf && RUN_TOOL_FORCE_ABSENT=1 bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/composite-dispatch.sh" --file main.tf 2>e.txt; grep -q 'tool=checkov' e.txt && echo routed-to-checkov 1>&2
